title: microcos ossea
intro: Microcos ossea, also known as the Sabah Oak or Yellow Butea, is a plant species native to Borneo and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microcos ossea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Microcos ossea is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it has also been used in traditional herbal preparations to treat various health conditions.
